meta.title: ID3 Tags Editor Online – Edit MP3, FLAC, OGG & M4A Metadata
meta.description: Edit ID3 tags and audio metadata online. Update artist, title, album and add cover art for MP3, FLAC, OGG & M4A. Free, fast and easy to use.

header.title: ID3 Tags Editor
header.subtitle: Edit audio metadata & add cover art (MP3, FLAC, OGG, M4A)

hero.title: Edit ID3 Tags & Audio Metadata Online
hero.description: Upload your audio file and edit ID3 tags for MP3 or metadata for FLAC, OGG, and M4A in seconds. Update artist, title, album, and add cover art easily. Fast, free, and works directly in your browser — no software required.
hero.dropzoneIdle: Upload audio file to edit tags & add cover
hero.dropzoneReading: Processing your audio file and loading metadata...
hero.dropzoneDescription: Drag & drop your audio file or click to upload. Edit tags and add cover art instantly — fast and easy.
hero.dropzoneSupport: Supports MP3 (ID3), FLAC, OGG, M4A • Cover: PNG, JPG, WEBP
steps: Upload your audio file (MP3, FLAC, OGG, or M4A).
Edit ID3 tags or audio metadata.

items.title: Edit ID3 Tags & Audio Metadata
items.description: Edit ID3 tags for MP3 and update metadata for FLAC, OGG, and M4A files. Change title, artist, album, track, genre, year, and filename in a simple and intuitive editor.

items.title: Add & Update Cover Art
items.description: Add or replace cover artwork for your audio files in seconds. Supports MP3, FLAC, OGG, and M4A with PNG, JPG, and WEBP images.

items.title: Fast & Free Audio Tag Editor
items.description: Upload your audio file, edit tags, and download instantly. No installation, no limits, and completely free online metadata editor.

file.readyDescription: Audio metadata loaded. You can now edit tags and add cover art.
file.name: File name

status.idle: Drop your audio file here or choose a file to edit tags and add cover.
status.reading: Loading audio file and reading metadata from {filename}...
status.loaded: Audio file loaded. You can now edit tags and add cover art.
status.coverRemoved: Cover image removed. Save to apply.
status.saving: Saving audio file with updated tags and cover...
status.saved: Done. Your updated file is downloading.
status.saveFailed: Could not save the updated file.

warnings.coverPending: Cover image selected but not yet applied to the audio file. Save to apply.

errors.readFailed: Could not read the audio file.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save the updated file.

cover.empty: No cover image found in this file.
cover.instructions: Supports PNG, JPG, WEBP. Add or update cover art for your audio file — square images work best and are auto-optimized.

footer.text: ID3 Tag Editor | Simple audio metadata editing, made with ❤️

cookies.bannerText: We use cookies for essential functionality and to remember your preferences.
